items.subject: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
items.body: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.

items.subject: ‘The cost of compute is far beyond the costs of the employees’: Nvidia executive says right now AI is more expensive than paying human workers
items.body: Big Tech has announced $740 billion in capex this year, but AI has yet to show evidence of widespread increased productivity.

items.subject: AWS: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni model now available on Amazon SageMaker JumpStart
items.body: Today, we are excited to announce the day zero availability of NVIDIA...

items.subject: Together AI: Together AI Brings NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni to Developers on Day 0
items.body: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni is now on Together AI: a single open model that reasons across video, images, audio, and text, built for agentic workloads at scale.

items.subject: NVIDIA Launches Nemotron 3 Nano Omni Model, Unifying Vision, Audio and Language for up to 9x More Efficient AI Agents
items.body: AI agent systems today juggle separate models for vision, speech and language...

items.subject: IEEE Medal of Honor Recipient Is NVIDIA's CEO Jensen Huang
items.body: IEEE Spectrum

items.subject: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.body: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.

items.subject: Our commitment to community safety
items.body: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.

items.subject: Microsoft and OpenAI’s famed AGI agreement is dead
items.body: OpenAI and Microsoft's partnership-turned-situationship just got even less committed. And a clause about artificial general intelligence, which has for years dictated the future of their deal, has officially been dropped. On Monday morning, Microsoft announce…

items.subject: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
items.body: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.

items.subject: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
items.body: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.

items.subject: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.body: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U. S. federal agencies.

items.subject: Microsoft and OpenAI end their exclusive and revenue-sharing deal
items.body: Microsoft and OpenAI are loosening their exclusive partnership, allowing OpenAI to offer its products across any cloud provider. Microsoft keeps non-exclusive rights to OpenAI technology through 2032, but will stop receiving a revenue share from OpenAI going forward, while still receiving capped payments through 2030 under existing agreements and remaining a major shareholder.

items.subject: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.body: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.

items.subject: Product Hunt Launch: Codex 3.0 by OpenAI
items.body: Codex can now build, test & debug on autopilot

items.subject: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.5 Powers Codex on NVIDIA Infrastructure — and NVIDIA Is Already Putting It to Work
items.body: AI agents have revolutionized developer workflows, and their next frontier is knowledge...

items.subject: How to get started with Codex
items.body: Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.

items.subject: What is Codex?
items.body: Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.

items.subject: Working with Codex
items.body: Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.

items.subject: Plugins and skills
items.body: Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.

items.subject: Top 10 uses for Codex at work
items.body: Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.

items.subject: Automations
items.body: Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.

items.subject: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
items.body: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.

items.subject: Introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0
items.body: ChatGPT Images 2.0 introduces a state-of-the-art image generation model with improved text rendering, multilingual support, and advanced visual reasoning.

items.subject: Introducing OpenAI Privacy Filter
items.body: OpenAI Privacy Filter is an open-weight model for detecting and redacting personally identifiable information (PII) in text with state-of-the-art accuracy

items.subject: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
items.body: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.

items.subject: Workspace agents
items.body: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.

summary:
**Key Developments:**

* **NVIDIA releases Nemotron 3 Nano Omni model**: A unified, multimodal AI agent that can reason across video, images, audio, and text, designed for efficient AI agent systems.
* **OpenAI announces partnership with AWS**: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
* **Microsoft and OpenAI end exclusive partnership**: Microsoft and OpenAI are loosening their exclusive partnership, allowing OpenAI to offer its products across any cloud provider.
* **NVIDIA's CEO Jensen Huang receives IEEE Medal of Honor**: NVIDIA's CEO Jensen Huang was awarded the IEEE Medal of Honor for his contributions to the development of AI and computer vision.
* **OpenAI announces new features and integrations**: OpenAI has announced several new features and integrations, including ChatGPT Images 2.0, OpenAI Privacy Filter, and workspace agents in ChatGPT.

**Trend:**
The increasing focus on AI and machine learning (ML) has led to a surge in the development of AI models and platforms. This trend is expected to continue, with major players like NVIDIA, OpenAI, and Microsoft investing heavily in AI research and development. The integration of AI and ML into various industries, including healthcare, finance, and education, is also expected to drive growth in the AI market.
